testcase.name: test_published_episodes_are_structured_so_the_relay_routes_them_to_the_deterministic_writer

failure.message: pytest_bdd.exceptions.StepDefinitionNotFoundError: Step definition is not found: Given "the guardkit markdown corpus is available on disk with seed modules, ADRs, review reports, and completed-task outcomes".
